API Reference¶

import nstat
print(nstat.__all__)

Canonical modules include:

  • nstat.signal

  • nstat.spikes

  • nstat.trial

  • nstat.analysis

  • nstat.fit

  • nstat.cif

  • nstat.decoding

  • nstat.datasets
